v-moy23trj-nxj2.title: Sunlit Rooftop Brunch, Garden Lounge in the City
v-moy23trj-nxj2.oneLiner: A silver disco ball hangs over the patio while an egg-topped baked dish lands on a blue-and-white check tablecloth.
v-moy23trj-nxj2.lighting: Bright direct sunlight with crisp daytime shadows, softened in spots by canopy and umbrella shade.
v-moy23trj-nxj2.spatial: An open-air rooftop courtyard café layered with planters, lounge chairs, dining tables, and views of surrounding high-rise buildings.
visualMotifs: hanging ferns and dense potted greenery
silver disco ball over café seating
pastry case and plated brunch dishes
blue metal chairs and blue table accents

creativeBrief.subject: At midday, bright direct sunlight cuts across an open-air rooftop courtyard café, throwing crisp shadows between patches of yellow-canopy shade. A blue-and-white check tablecloth covers a small dining table where an egg-topped baked dish has just been set down, its edges glowing warm in the sun. Overhead, a silver disco ball hangs above the seating, catching sharp flecks of light. Around it, dense potted greenery spills from planters, cobalt blue chairs ring nearby tables, and high-rise buildings frame the clear city sky.

shots.description: A wide midday view of an open-air rooftop courtyard café shows diners shifting in their seats, servers weaving between nearby tables, leaves trembling in dense potted greenery, and the silver disco ball scattering moving flecks above cobalt blue chairs.

At table height, a blue-and-white check tablecloth fills the foreground as steam wavers from an egg-topped baked dish, a hand slides cutlery into place, sunlight creeps across the fabric, and shadows from passing guests drift over the small dining table.

Looking up from beneath the seating, a silver disco ball slowly turns in the breeze while hanging leaves sway around dense potted greenery, bright reflections skate across cobalt blue chairs, and bits of movement from diners pass below against high-rise buildings and the clear city sky.

heroShot.description: A locked table-level medium frames the "blue-and-white check tablecloth" and the egg-topped baked dish in bright midday sun, with the silver disco ball and cobalt blue chairs softly active in the background.
heroShot.motion: 0:00 the egg-topped baked dish sits centered on the blue-and-white check tablecloth as fresh steam lifts into the sun; 0:02 a hand enters and slides cutlery into place beside the dish; 0:04 a passing guest’s shadow drifts across the small dining table while sunlight creeps over the cloth; 0:06 flecks from the silver disco ball shimmer across nearby cobalt blue chairs and dense potted greenery; 0:08 the steam thins as the table settles back into bright rooftop stillness

creativeBrief.musicPrompt:
[REFERENCE FROM SOURCE]
[no source audio analysis]
Airy, sunlit café-chamber texture with gentle acoustic warmth, spacious phrasing, and soft open-air detail. [STRUCTURE — 90 seconds]
0:00–0:15 Intro: solo nylon-string guitar, very quiet, no rhythm section, establish the key with sparse single notes and lightly voiced intervals, leaving room between each phrase.
0:15–0:45 Body: muted upright piano joins. Sparse interplay with breath between phrases, tempo steady, unhurried and light, each response slightly varied so no line returns the same way twice.
0:45–1:15 Development: harmonic motion increases with brief modal substitutions while staying in the same key center; soft clarinet adds colour for 4–8 bars, weaving short countermelodies above the guitar and piano, then recedes. Keep dynamics restrained and conversational.
0:15–1:30 Outro: simplifies back to mostly nylon-string guitar, piano falling away first, clarinet absent; let the final tones decay into the room, with a subtle hint of glasses and bottles clinking with light city ambience in the last 4 seconds. [ROOM CONTEXT]
Midday in a bright open-air rooftop courtyard café, the mood is sunny, relaxed, and social. [RULES]
- Never repeat the same melodic motif twice.
- Leave 1-2 second pauses between phrases.
- No build to chorus or climax. This is ambient, not pop.
- Stay in the same key throughout; modal substitutions OK.
- Instrumental, no vocals.
